title: Red Soul
description: This Resource Pack, in turn, replaces the Blue soul with a red one.
body:
Resource Pack, in turn, replaces the Blue soul with a red one.
It has also been replaced in the soul fire, soul lamp, and soul bonfire textures at this point.


It is suitable for those who like red.
![Red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10458e5b1300c7df54147744c91eabebdaa4fa33.png) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fe5650054fa68c9d79d1f232b7b06ff9399fdd1.png)
